---
title: "Welcome to My Portfolio"
---

<br>

<div class="row">
  <div class="col-sm-4">
    <img src="profile.jpg" alt="Tianjie Zhang" class="profile-img">
  </div>
  <div class="col-sm-8">
    ### Hello, I'm Tianjie Zhang!
    
    I am a Master's candidate in **Biostatistics** at Emory University, graduating in May 2026. I am passionate about leveraging statistical modeling and spatial data analysis to drive impactful decisions in healthcare and business. 
    
    My academic journey combines a solid undergraduate foundation in International Business and Spanish with advanced graduate-level analytical training. I specialize in turning complex datasets into actionable insights.
    
    **Technical Proficiencies:**
    * **Programming & Tools:** R, Python (Pandas/NumPy), SQL, ArcGIS Pro
    * **Methodologies:** Spatial Analysis (ZINB Modeling), Data Visualization, Machine Learning
    
    Feel free to explore my [CV](cv.html) or check out my recent [Projects](projects.html).
  </div>
</div>
